plugins.name: notebooklm-enhanced
plugins.description: Comprehensive Google NotebookLM automation — create notebooks, add sources, generate podcasts/videos/quizzes/slides, and run multi-notebook research workflows via RPC API

plugins.name: rust-network-module
plugins.description: Scaffold new Rust async networking modules with Tokio, tracing, and anyhow following established project patterns

plugins.name: safe-fetch
plugins.description: Sanitizing web fetch for Claude Code — strips prompt injection vectors before content reaches the LLM

plugins.name: marketplace-manager
plugins.description: Manage the fakoli-plugins marketplace: add/remove plugins, validate manifests, and regenerate registry indices

plugins.name: excalidraw-diagram
plugins.description: Generate and modify Excalidraw diagrams from natural language descriptions and code analysis

plugins.name: gws-plugin
plugins.description: Operate across all Google Workspace services using the gws CLI — 100 skills, 15 slash commands, 11 role-based agents, and 44 automation recipes covering email, calendar, drive, docs, sheets, slides, tasks, chat, meet, forms, classroom, keep, people, events, admin reports, model armor, and apps script.

plugins.name: nano-banana-pro
plugins.description: Generate, edit, remix, and optimize images using Google's Gemini 3 Pro Image Preview model

plugins.name: k8s-sidecar-testing
plugins.description: End-to-end testing workflow for nat464-sidecar in IPv6-only Kubernetes clusters using Multipass VMs and k3s
